title: Write Your Self-Introduction
learningGoal: The learner will write a 3-4 sentence self-introduction in Japanese, stating their name, nationality, and occupation using the 'A wa B desu' pattern.
instructions: It is your turn to introduce yourself! Write a short introduction in Japanese. You must include the opening greeting ('Hajimemashite'), your name, your nationality (make one up if you want, e.g. 'Amerika-jin' or 'Igirisu-jin'), your occupation, and the closing greeting ('Yoroshiku onegaishimasu').

contentItems.text: Remember to use the particle 'wa' (は) and end your statements with 'desu' (です).

writingPrompt: Write a complete self-introduction containing at least 4 sentences.
promptGoal: To demonstrate the ability to construct 'A wa B desu' sentences independently to convey personal identity.

wordBank.targetText: よろしく おねがいします

referenceHints: Sentence 2: As for me, [Name] it is.
Sentence 3: As for me, [Country]-person it is. (You can drop 'Watashi wa' if it's obvious).

modelExampleOutputs.targetText: はじめまして。わたしは ジョンです。イギリスじんです。がくせいです。よろしく おねがいします。
modelExampleOutputs.transliteration: Hajimemashite. Watashi wa Jon desu. Igirisu-jin desu. Gakusei desu. Yoroshiku onegaishimasu.
modelExampleOutputs.baseTranslation: Nice to meet you. I am John. I am British. I am a student. Please treat me well.
modelExampleOutputs.annotation: Uses all required elements perfectly with correct particles and formal verbs.

modelExampleOutputs.targetText: はじめまして。わたしは サラです。カナダじんです。せんせいです。よろしく おねがいします。
modelExampleOutputs.transliteration: Hajimemashite. Watashi wa Sara desu. Kanada-jin desu. Sensei desu. Yoroshiku onegaishimasu.
modelExampleOutputs.baseTranslation: Nice to meet you. I am Sarah. I am Canadian. I am a teacher. Please treat me well.
modelExampleOutputs.annotation: Perfectly structured self-introduction replacing student with teacher.

evaluationCriteria.description: Did the learner start with Hajimemashite and end with Yoroshiku onegaishimasu?
Are the sentences formed correctly using 'wa' and 'desu'?
Did the learner include name, nationality, and occupation?

adminCorrectAnswerSet.sampleAnswer: はじめまして。わたしは アレックスです。アメリカじんです。がくせいです。よろしく おねがいします。
acceptableAlternates: Any correctly formed paragraph that uses 'watashi wa [name] desu', '[country] jin desu', and '[occupation] desu'.
requiredKeywords: よろしく おねがいします

feedbackRules.onPass: Fantastic writing! Your self-introduction is clear, polite, and grammatically correct.
feedbackRules.onFail: Please review the examples. Make sure you are ending your sentences with 'desu'.
feedbackRules.onPartial: Good try! Make sure you didn't forget the opening or closing greetings, which are crucial in Japanese.

hintText: Once you state 'Watashi wa' in the first sentence, you can drop it in the next sentences because the topic (you) is already understood.
commonMistakes: Forgetting to add 'jin' to the country name.
Using 'ha' instead of 'wa' for the topic particle when writing in romaji (if typing).
